title: Chef Aid Non-Stick Brownie Tray, Baking Tin for Traybakes, Flapjacks & Brownies, Easy Clean Bakeware, Grey, 28.5 x 18 x 3 cm
features: BAKING SHEET: This Chef aid baking sheet is ideal for use making Brownies, traybakes and cakes, alternatively this tray can be used for a range of cooking applications too; such as chips, vegatables reheating left overs and many more, thanks to its non-stick properties surface, no need for greaseproof paper

ROBUST: The thick carbon steel is incredibly strong, long-lasting and is an excellent heat conductor, incorporating a Goldflon non stick coating to allow cooked and baked goods to slide off with ease. Perfect size of 28 x 18 x 3 and inner size of 23.5 x 13.5 x 2.9 cm

FREEZER AND FRIDGE SAFE: This essential Brownie Tray can store baked goods in the fridge or freezer, the ability to go from freezer to oven is ideal for pre baking, and reheating from frozen when needed to keep baked goods fresher for longer

EASY STORAGE: This oven baking sheet is stackable for easy storage so you don't have to worry about it taking up a lot of space in your kitchen cupboards; Simply wash, dry and store safely until the next use
CHEF AID: The well known non-stick cookware range is a loved and popular range of products that caters for both domestic and commercial uses, the range of products is essential and built for everyd
